programme.title: Bad Santa 2
programme.desc: Fueled by cheap whiskey, greed and hatred, Willie Soke (Billy Bob Thornton) teams up with his angry little sidekick, Marcus, to knock off a Chicago charity on Christmas Eve. Along for the ride is chubby and cheery Thurman Merman, a 250-pound ray of sunshine who brings out Willie's sliver of humanity. Mommy issues arise when the pair are joined by Willie's horror story of a mother, Sunny Soke, who

programme.title: Valentine's Day
programme.desc: In a series of interconnected stories, various Los Angeles residents (Jessica Alba, Jessica Biel, Bradley Cooper) wend their way through the highs and lows of love during a single day. As the holiday unfolds, they experience first dates, longtime commitments, youthful crushes and connections to old flames.

programme.title: Dim Sum Funeral
programme.desc: In the wake of her death, the embittered children of Chinese-American matriarch Mrs. Xiao (Lisa Lu) begrudgingly return to their childhood home for a bristly -- and brief, they hope -- reunion. But after Xiao's maid and sole confidant, Viola (Talia Shire), reveals her wish to undergo a week-long Buddhist funeral rite, the younger Xiaos -- including plastic surgeon Alexander (Russell Wong) and lesb

programme.title: The Best Exotic Marigold Hotel
programme.desc: Some British retirees (Judi Dench, Maggie Smith, Bill Nighy) decide to outsource their retirement to exotic -- and less expensive -- India. Lured by advertisements for the newly restored Marigold Hotel and imagining a life of leisure in lush surroundings, they arrive and find that the Marigold is actually a shell of its former self. Though their new home is not quite what they had imagined, the re

programme.title: Despicable Me
programme.desc: Supervillain Gru, a man who delights in all things wicked, hatches a plan to steal the moon. Surrounded by an army of little yellow minions and his impenetrable arsenal of weapons and war machines, Gru prepares to vanquish all who stand in his way. However, nothing in his calculations and groundwork has prepared him for his greatest challenge: three adorable orphan girls who want to make him their

programme.title: Fantastic Beasts: A Natural History
programme.desc: Delving into the mythological, including dragons, mermaids, and unicorns -- alongside examinations of natural world beasts, such as vervet monkeys, narwhals, and manatees; Stephen Fry travels far and wide to learn about such animals.

programme.title: Rampage
programme.desc: Primatologist Davis Okoye shares an unshakable bond with George, an extraordinarily intelligent, silverback gorilla that's been in his care since birth. When a rogue genetic experiment goes wrong, it causes George, a wolf and a reptile to grow to a monstrous size. As the mutated beasts embark on a path of destruction, Okoye teams up with a discredited genetic engineer and the military to secure an

programme.title: Public Enemies
programme.desc: Depression-era bank robber John Dillinger's charm and audacity endear him to much of America's downtrodden public, but he's also a thorn in the side of J. Edgar Hoover and the fledgling FBI. Desperate to capture the elusive outlaw, Hoover makes Dillinger his first Public Enemy Number One and assigns his top agent, Melvin Purvis, the task of bringing him in dead or alive.

programme.title: Memento
programme.desc: Leonard (Guy Pearce) is tracking down the man who raped and murdered his wife. The difficulty, however, of locating his wife's killer is compounded by the fact that he suffers from a rare, untreatable form of memory loss. Although he can recall details of life before his accident, Leonard cannot remember what happened fifteen minutes ago, where he's going, or why.

programme.title: Final Destination
programme.desc: Alex Browning is embarking on a trip to Paris. He experiences a premonition -- he sees the plane explode moments after leaving the ground. Insisting that everyone get off the plane, Alex and seven other people are forced to disembark. All watch as the plane actually explodes in a fireball. He and the other survivors have briefly cheated death, but will not be able to evade their fate for very long

programme.title: The Final Destination
programme.desc: While enjoying a day at the track, Nick O'Bannon (Bobby Campo) has a horrific premonition of his friends and him all dying in a freak accident involving many racecars. Mere seconds before the vision comes true, he manages to convince them to leave. Although they cheat death then, the survivors each begin to meet a grisly end, and Nick tries to figure a way to escape a similar fate.

programme.title: The House
programme.desc: Scott and Kate Johansen must figure out a way to earn some money after their daughter's scholarship falls through. When all else fails, the desperate couple join forces with their neighbor Frank to start an underground casino in his home. As the cash rolls in and the good times fly, Scott and Kate soon learn that they may have bitten off more than they can chew.

programme.title: Chasing Mavericks
programme.desc: When 15-year-old surfing phenomenon Jay Moriarty discovers that the mythic Mavericks surf break, one of the biggest waves on Earth, actually exists near his California home, he becomes determined to conquer it. Jay enlists the aid of local surfing legend Frosty Hesson to train him to ride the Mavericks and live to tell about it. As Jay and Frosty carry on their quest to achieve the impossible, the

programme.title: Spare Parts
programme.desc: With the help of their high school's newest teacher (George Lopez), four Hispanic students form a robotics club. Although they have no experience, the youths set their sights on a national robotics contest. With $800 and parts scavenged from old cars, they build a robot and compete against reigning champion MIT. Along the way, the students learn not only how to build a robot but something far more

programme.title: The Switch
programme.desc: Neurotic Wally Mars has one bright spot in his life: his friendship with Kassie. When Kassie announces her intention to become pregnant using a sperm donor, Wally thinks he will be the lucky guy, but Kassie has someone else in mind. While drunk at Kassie's insemination party, Wally substitutes his sperm for the donor's, then passes out, remembering nothing. Seven years later, Wally meets Kassie's

programme.title: Shot Caller
programme.desc: Recently released from prison, a gang member finds himself forced by his leaders to orchestrate a major crime with a rival gang.

programme.title: The Terminator
programme.desc: Disguised as a human, a cyborg assassin known as a Terminator (Arnold Schwarzenegger) travels from 2029 to 1984 to kill Sarah Connor (Linda Hamilton). Sent to protect Sarah is Kyle Reese (Michael Biehn), who divulges the coming of Skynet, an artificial intelligence system that will spark a nuclear holocaust. Sarah is targeted because Skynet knows that her unborn son will lead the fight against the

programme.title: It
programme.desc: In 1960, seven preteen outcasts fight an evil demon that poses as a child-killing clown. Thirty years later, they reunite to stop the demon once and for all when it returns to their hometown.

programme.title: Night on Earth
programme.desc: This film presents five stories, each involving a cab ride and set in a different city around the world. In Los Angeles, no-nonsense taxi driver Corky (Winona Ryder) gets an engaging customer in the form of a Hollywood casting agent (Gena Rowlands), while a Parisian cabbie (Isaach De Bankolé) must contend with some rowdy African diplomats. Among the other tales, a standout is the Italian taxi ride

programme.title: Twin Peaks: Fire Walk With Me
programme.desc: In the folksy town of Deerfield, Wash., FBI Agent Desmond (Chris Isaak) inexplicably disappears while hunting for the man who murdered a teen girl. The killer is never apprehended, and, after experiencing dark visions and supernatural encounters, Agent Dale Cooper (Kyle MacLachlan) chillingly predicts that the culprit will claim another life. Meanwhile, in the similarly cozy town of Twin Peaks, he

programme.title: Nanny McPhee Returns
programme.desc: Enigmatic Nanny McPhee arrives on the doorstep of a harried mother, Isabel Green, who is trying to raise her kids and tend to the family farm while her husband is away at war. Isabel has her hands full of not only her own three, but also with her sister's spoiled pair. With no time to lose, McPhee uses magic to instill in the children five important lessons.

programme.title: The Daytrippers
programme.desc: Eliza D'Amico's seemingly idyllic marriage to Louis changes dramatically when she discovers what she believes to be a love letter to him from someone else. Going home to her family for comfort, Eliza sets out with her mother, father, sister and her sister's boyfriend in the family car to track down and confront Louis. Always one step behind him, the family learns a lot about each other in the proc

programme.title: A Perfect Getaway
programme.desc: Newlyweds Cliff (Steve Zahn) and Cydney (Milla Jovovich) are celebrating their honeymoon by hiking through a secluded region of Hawaii. Their idyllic trek takes a dark turn when they find a group of frightened hikers who claim that another couple has been brutally murdered. Far from civilization and unsure who to trust, Cydney and Cliff soon get locked into a terrifying battle for survival.

programme.title: Fantastic Planet
programme.desc: This animated tale follows the relationship between the small human-like Oms and their much larger blue-skinned oppressors, the Draags, who rule the planet of Ygam. While the Draags have long kept Oms as illiterate pets, this hierarchy shifts after an Om boy becomes educated, thanks to a young female Draag. This leads to an Om rebellion, which weakens the Draag control over their race. Will the Om

programme.title: Mississippi Masala
programme.desc: After Mina's Indian family is ousted from their home in Uganda by dictator Idi Amin, they relocate to Mississippi to start a new life. Mina falls for Demetrius, a young carpet cleaner, despite the protestations of their families over their racial difference. The families and their surrounding communities begin to feud, putting even more pressure on the couple's romance. Having to choose between fa

programme.title: Green Lantern: First Flight
programme.desc: The Green Lantern must race against time to stop Sinestro from unleashing a sinister plot.

programme.title: Green Lantern: Emerald Knights
programme.desc: New recruit Arisia (Elisabeth Moss) joins forces with Hal Jordan (Nathan Fillion) to save the universe from the forces of Krona.

programme.title: Superman Returns
programme.desc: While Lex Luthor plots to destroy him once and for all, the Man of Steel returns after a long absence to a much-changed world. Lois Lane has moved on with her life, and society has learned to survive without him. Superman must find a way to reconnect with her and find his place in a world that may no longer need him.

programme.title: The Snakes
programme.desc: A woman's violent fantasies spiral out of control when she joins a neighborhood watch group.

programme.title: Charlie and the Chocolate Factory
programme.desc: Based on the beloved Roald Dahl tale, this comedic and fantastical film follows young Charlie Bucket (Freddie Highmore) and his Grandpa Joe (David Kelly) as they join a small group of contest winners who get to tour the magical and mysterious factory of eccentric candy maker Willy Wonka (Johnny Depp). Aided by his diminutive Oompa Loompa workers (Deep Roy), Wonka has a hidden motivation for the to

programme.title: Red Riding Hood
programme.desc: Young Valerie (Amanda Seyfried) feels torn between two men. She loves Peter, but her parents intend that she marry wealthy Henry. Valerie and Peter are going to run away together, but her sister is killed by a werewolf before they can put their plan into action. The villagers call on the help of Father Solomon (Gary Oldman), a famous monster hunter who warns that the beast takes human form by day.

programme.title: Mom and Dad Save the World
programme.desc: While planning to destroy Earth with a gigantic laser beam, Emperor Tod Spengo (Jon Lovitz), ruler of the planet Spengo, catches a glimpse of housewife Marge Nelson (Teri Garr) and becomes smitten with her. programme.title: The Man
programme.desc: Seeking the gunrunners who killed his partner, undercover cop Derrick Vann (Samuel L. Jackson) sets up a sting. He arranges to meet an arms dealer at a diner, where he'll be the only one reading USA Today. programme.title: Volunteers
programme.desc: Hoping to avoid gambling debts, rich playboy Lawrence Bourne (Tom Hanks) stows away on a plane of Peace Corps volunteers set for Thailand. Once aboard, he meets the outrageously affable Tom Tuttle (John Candy), who shows him the ropes. After landing, the crew is stationed in a small town where they are to construct a bridge. programme.title: The Art of Getting By
programme.desc: George (Freddie Highmore) is a senior at a posh Manhattan prep school, but his disaffected attitude leaves little room for toeing the line. He'd rather doodle and read philosophy, and he strenuously avoids his parents (Rita Wilson, Sam Robards) whenever possible. Unfortunately, George's attitude is endangering his chances of graduating. programme.title: Colette
programme.desc: After moving to Paris, author Sidonie-Gabrielle Colette agrees to ghostwrite a semi-autobiographical novel for her husband. Its success soon inspires her to fight for creative ownership and overcome the societal constraints of the early 20th century.

programme.title: Love Happens
programme.desc: Dr. Burke Ryan (Aaron Eckhart) is a self-help guru who is on the verge of a lucrative multimedia deal. But there's a problem: though he advises his patients to confront their pain, Burke has never come to terms with his wife's death. Eloise Chandler (Jennifer Aniston) has had enough of men and dating, and is busy concentrating on her floral business. When they meet, Burke and Eloise feel an instan

programme.title: Sunshine Cleaning
programme.desc: Though they once seemed to have a bright future, life seems to be passing by the Norkowski sisters. Rose (Amy Adams), once the most popular girl in high school, is a single mom and works as a maid. Norah (Emily Blunt) still lives at home with their father (Alan Arkin) and parties all the time. programme.title: The Post
programme.desc: Katharine Graham is the first female publisher of a major American newspaper -- The Washington Post. With help from editor Ben Bradlee, Graham races to catch up with The New York Times to expose a massive cover-up of government secrets that spans three decades and four U.S. presidents. Together, they must overcome their differences as they risk their careers -- and very freedom -- to help bring lo

programme.title: Taking Woodstock
programme.desc: In the summer of 1969, Elliot Tiber divides his time between Greenwich Village and the upstate ramshackle motel, El Monaco, of his Old World parents. programme.title: Broken City
programme.desc: Former cop Billy Taggart (Mark Wahlberg) sees a chance at redemption for past sins when New York City's Mayor Nicolas Hostetler (Russell Crowe) calls on him for a special job. However, a bigger scandal than expected pulls in Billy right at the start of his investigation

programme.title: Going the Distance
programme.desc: Erin (Drew Barrymore) and Garrett (Justin Long) are very much in love. When Erin moves to San Francisco to finish her journalism degree and Garrett stays behind in New York to work in the music industry, they gamely keep the romance alive with webcams and frequent-flyer miles. But just when it seems the lovers will soon be reunited, they each score a big break that could separate them for good.

programme.desc: New York high-school student Lisa Cohen (Anna Paquin) inadvertently causes an accident in which a bus driver (Mark Ruffalo) runs over a pedestrian (Allison Janney). programme.title: The Hole in the Ground
programme.desc: One night, Sarah's young son disappears into the woods behind their rural home. When he returns, he looks the same, but his behavior grows increasingly disturbing. Sarah begins to believe that the boy who returned may not be her son at all.

programme.desc: The true life story of Megan Leavey, a young Marine corporal whose unique discipline and bond with a military combat dog saved many lives during her deployment in Iraq. Desperate to capture the elusive outlaw, Hoover makes Dillinger his first Public Enemy Number One and assigns his top agent, Melvin Purvis, the task of bringing him in dead or alive.

programme.title: The Alto Knights
programme.desc: In the 1950s, notorious New York crime bosses Frank Costello and Vito Genovese vie for control of the city streets. Once the best of friends, petty jealousies and a series of betrayals place them on a deadly collision course that reshapes organized crime forever.

programme.title: Mickey 17
programme.desc: A disposable employee is sent on a human expedition to colonize the ice world Niflheim. After one iteration dies, a new body is regenerated with most of his memories intact.

programme.title: War for the Planet of the Apes
programme.desc: Caesar (Andy Serkis) and his apes are forced into a deadly conflict with an army of humans led by a ruthless colonel (Woody Harrelson). Howev

programme.title: Lord of the Flies

programme.title: Ghost Dog: The Way of the Samurai

In the spirit of the samurai, he has pledged his loyalty to a small time mobster named Louie (John Tormey) who saved his life many years before.

programme.title: Scanners
programme.desc: Scanners are men and women born with incredible telepathic and telekinetic powers. There are many who exercise the benefits of their special gifts in a safe and judicious manner. However, there is a group of renegade scanners who plan to create a race that will rule the world.

programme.title: Contagion
programme.desc: When Beth Emhoff returns to Minnesota from a Hong Kong business trip, she attributes the malaise she feels to jet lag. However, two days later, Beth is dead, and doctors tell her shocked husband that they have no idea what killed her. Soon, many others start to exhibit the same symptoms, and a global pandemic explodes. Doctors try to contain the lethal microbe, but society begins to collapse as a

programme.title: Rampage
programme.desc: Primatologist Davis Okoye shares an unshakable bond with George, an extraordinarily intelligent, silverback gorilla that's been in his care since birth. When a rogue genetic experiment goes wrong, it causes George, a wolf and a reptile to grow to a monstrous size. As the mutated beasts embark on a path of destruction, Okoye teams up with a discredited genetic engineer and the military to secure an

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: All-action thriller. Queen Latifah stars as the driver of the fastest taxi in New York, who teams up with an inept cop (Jimmy Fallon) to catch a team of female bank-robbers.

programme.title: Prey
programme.desc: It's Predator, 1719 style. Amber Midthunder stars as a Comanche hunter who must save her tribe from an extraterrestrial threat in this action prequel. If it bleeds, you can kill it.

programme.title: Crawl
programme.desc: Soggy, snappy reptilian horror with Kaya Scodelario. A talented swimmer must use her water-based skills to evade a congregation of alligators during a flood.

programme.title: No Exit
programme.desc: Thriller. A recovering addict ends up stranded at a remote visitor centre in a snowstorm with four strangers, then finds a kidnapped girl in the car park. Question is: who did it.

programme.desc: Chris helps future-proof a family's hallway for Tom, a boy recently diagnosed with Usher Syndrome.

programme.title: Shenandoah

programme.title: The Andromeda Strain
programme.desc: Sci-fi thriller. When a space rocket crash-lands in the US, a fatal alien virus is released, sparking a desperate battle to defeat the extraterrestrial life form and save mankind.

programme.title: Reap the Wild Wind
programme.desc: Period melodrama. John Wayne, Ray Milland and Paulette Goddard star in this tale of fierce rivalries engendered by love and seemingly deliberate shipwrecking in 19th-century Florida.

programme.title: Midway
programme.desc: Roland Emmerich's sprawling, action-packed war drama about the Battle of Midway, a major turning point in World War II. Starring Ed Skrein, Luke Evans and Woody Harrelson.

programme.title: Monolith
programme.desc: Sci-fi horror with Lily Sullivan as a disgraced journalist investigating mysterious manifestations of vision-inducing - possibly supernatural - black bricks. Matt Vesley directs.

programme.title: Firestarter
programme.desc: Stephen King adaptation with Zac Efron. Superpowered parents try to protect their pyrokinetic daughter from a shadowy organisation. Can they stop her becoming a twisted fire starter.

programme.title: The Flight of the Phoenix
programme.desc: Tense tale about a group of men who are left stranded in the middle of the Arabian desert after a plane crash. Their only hope of survival is to rebuild the craft so that, phoenix-like, she may fly again and carry them to safety, but can the captain and navigator calm the passengers as tension mounts and time starts to run out?

programme.title: Patton
programme.desc: Biography of controversial World War II hero General George S. Patton. The film covers his wartime activities and accomplishments, beginning with his entry into the North African campaign and ending with his removal from command after his outspoken criticism of US post-war military strategy.

programme.title: M*A*S*H

programme.title: The Last Full Measure
programme.desc: Airman William H. Pitsenbarger Jr. is awarded the Medal of Honor for his service and actions on the battlefield.

programme.title: Annapolis

programme.title: Red Tails
programme.desc: During World War II, the Civil Aeronautics Authority selects 13 black cadets to become part of an experimental program at the Tuskegee Institute in Alabama. programme.title: Pearl Harbor

programme.desc: Airman William H. Pitsenbarger Jr. is awarded the Medal of Honor for his service and actions on the battlefield.

This threesome in one of the most famous and gloriously powerful love triangles ever to be captured on film.

programme.title: Lincoln

programme.title: Tolkien
programme.desc: As a young student, J.R.R. Tolkien finds love, friendship and artistic inspiration among a group of fellow outcasts. Their brotherhood soon strengthens as Tolkien weathers the storm of a tumultuous courtship with Edith Bratt and the outbreak of World War I. These early life experiences later inspire the budding author to write the classic fantasy novels "The Hobbit" and "The Lord of the Rings.".

programme.desc: When a married woman finds out that her young almost-lover has died, she is devastated, but must hide her grief from her husband. Later, it turns out she was not the dead young man's only lover, as the list of suspects in her small town grows.

programme.title: Big Lies in a Small Town
programme.desc: Young mother Rachel frantically searches for her teen daughter, Hannah, after their car crashes outside a small town; people die mysteriously in Rachel's wake as she gets closer to finding out that the local doctor kidnapped her daughter.

programme.title: Kidnapped in a Small Town
programme.desc: When her car breaks down in the middle of nowhere, Sarah's daughter, Ruby, gets a ride into town from a passing driver named Allie. However, when Sarah arrives at a nearby diner to meet them, Ruby is missing, and Allie claims they've never met.

programme.title: A Deadly Threat to My Family

programme.title: My Daughter's Double Life

programme.title: Regretting You
programme.desc: When a devastating accident reveals a shocking betrayal, Morgan Grant and her daughter, Clara, explore what's left behind as they confront family secrets, redefine love, and rediscover each other.

programme.title: Cadillac Man

Although they cheat death then, the survivors each begin to meet a grisly end, and Nick tries to figure a way to escape a similar fate.

programme.title: Indiana Jones and the Temple of Doom
programme.desc: The second of the Lucas/Spielberg Indiana Jones epics is set a year or so before the events in Raiders of the Lost Ark. Indy needs to retrieve a precious gem and several kidnapped young boys on behalf of a remote East Indian village. This time he teams up with a night club singer and a 12-year old boy.

programme.title: Indiana Jones and the Last Crusade
programme.desc: An art collector appeals to Jones to embark on a search for the Holy Grail. He learns that another archaeologist has disappeared while searching for the precious goblet, and the missing man is his own father, Dr. Henry Jones. The artifact is much harder to find than they expected, and its powers are too much for those impure in heart.

programme.title: Indiana Jones and the Kingdom of the Crystal Skull
programme.desc: It's the height of the Cold War, and famous archaeologist Indiana Jones (Harrison Ford), returning from his latest adventure, finds out his job at Marshall College is in jeopardy. He meets Mutt (Shia La Beouf), a young man who wants Indy to help him find the legendary Crystal Skull of Akator, and the pair set out for Peru. However, deadly agent Irina Spalko (Cate Blanchett) is searching for the po

programme.title: Terminator 2: Judgment Day
programme.desc: In this sequel set eleven years after "The Terminator," young John Connor (Edward Furlong), the key to civilization's victory over a future robot uprising, is the target of the shape-shifting T-1000 (Robert Patrick), a Terminator sent from the future to kill him. Another Terminator, the revamped T-800 (Arnold Schwarzenegger), has been sent back to protect the boy. As John and his mother (Linda Ham

programme.title: Terminator: Dark Fate
programme.desc: In Mexico City, a newly modified liquid Terminator -- the Rev-9 model -- arrives from the future to kill a young factory worker named Dani Ramos. Also sent back in time is Grace, a hybrid cyborg human who must protect Ramos from the seemingly indestructible robotic assassin. But the two women soon find some much-needed help from a pair of unexpected allies -- seasoned warrior Sarah Connor and the

programme.title: The Survivalist
programme.desc: A year and a half after the fall of civilization due to a viral outbreak, a former FBI agent is forced to protect a young woman immune to the disease from a dangerous gang leader hunting her.

programme.title: Couples Therapy
programme.desc: "Couples Therapy" is a documentary series following couples as they seek the help of psychoanalyst Dr. Orna Guralnik with their troubled relationships; coming off their previous success with the award-winning documentary "Weiner", executive producers Josh Kriegman and Elyse Steinberg are collaborating on the unscripted series that will feature real couples from New York City and its surrounding ar

programme.title: Couples Therapy
programme.desc: "Couples Therapy" is a documentary series following couples as they seek the help of psychoanalyst Dr. Orna Guralnik with their troubled relationships; coming off their previous success with the award-winning documentary "Weiner", executive producers Josh Kriegman and Elyse Steinberg are collaborating on the unscripted series that will feature real couples from New York City and its surrounding ar

programme.title: Doin' It
programme.desc: Moonlighting as a high-school substitute teacher, a 30-year-old virgin gets in over her head when she's assigned to teach sex education.

programme.title: Queen Bees
programme.desc: While her house undergoes repairs, fiercely independent senior Helen temporarily moves into a nearby retirement community, where she encounters lusty widows, cutthroat bridge tournaments and a hotbed of bullying "mean girls.".

programme.title: World Trade Center
programme.desc: Two Port Authority officers, Sgt. John McLoughlin (Nicolas Cage) and Officer Will Jimeno (Michael Peña), become trapped in the rubble of the World Trade Center after going in to help people escape from the buildings during the terrorist attacks of Sept. 11, 2001.

programme.title: In & Out
programme.desc: Welcome to Greenleaf, a picture-postcard Indiana town where the high school is the proud focus of attention and alternative lifestyle means you bowl on alternate Tuesdays. On the night of the Oscars telecast, the town's and the world's center of attention is Greenleaf teacher Howard Brackett. A former student who's now a superstar actor tells an audience of millions that Howard is gay.

programme.title: Memory
programme.desc: Social worker Sylvia's structured life is blown apart when Saul follows her home from their high school reunion. Their surprise encounter profoundly impacts both of them as they open the door to the past.

programme.title: Primal Fear
programme.desc: Defense attorney Martin Vail takes on jobs for money and prestige rather than any sense of the greater good. His latest case involves an altar boy, accused of brutally murdering the archbishop of Chicago. Vail finds himself up against his ex-pupil and ex-lover, but as the case progresses and the Church's dark secrets are revealed, Vail finds that what appeared a simple case takes on a darker, more

programme.title: Slingshot
programme.desc: An astronaut struggles to maintain his grip on reality during a possibly compromised mission to Saturn's moon, Titan.

programme.title: Grudge Match
programme.desc: Pittsburgh boxers Billy "The Kid" McDonnen (Robert De Niro) and Henry "Razor" Sharp (Sylvester Stallone) shared a fierce rivalry back in the 1980s. Each had scored a victory in two matches, but on the eve of their decisive third bout, Henry suddenly announced his retirement, effectively ending both boxers' careers. Thirty years later, boxing promoter Dante Slate Jr. (Kevin Hart) makes Billy and He

programme.title: The Wood
programme.desc: Three old friends -- Mike (Omar Epps), Roland (Taye Diggs) and Slim (Richard T. Jones) -- recount memories of their shared childhood in Inglewood, Calif., as they prepare for Roland's wedding to his fiancée, Lisa (LisaRaye). When the groom goes missing without a word, Mike and Slim struggle to find their nervous friend and return him to his impatient bride before the wedding begins. Along the way,

programme.title: Get Rich or Die Tryin'
programme.desc: After losing his mother to murder as a boy, Marcus (Curtis "50 Cent" Jackson) has little support in his life. He starts working for drug dealer Levar (Bill Duke) and his assistant (Adewale Akinnuoye-Agbaje). Although Marcus makes good money selling, his dream is to become a rapper. When he reunites with an old love (Joy Bryant) and is later shot numerous times during a robbery, Marcus decides it's

programme.title: Undisputed II: Last Man Standing
programme.desc: Imprisoned in Russia, a man (Michael Jai White) relies on his street-fighting skills while fighting boxers in the ring.

programme.title: The Comeback Trail
programme.desc: Indebted to a mobster, a desperate producer tries to "accidentally" kill an aging movie star for an insurance scam. However, he soon begins to realize that the film they're shooting is a masterpiece in the making.

programme.title: The Fighting Temptations
programme.desc: Advertising executive Darrin Hill (Cuba Gooding Jr.) loses his job and his girlfriend after his many lies about his background and education are discovered. Soon after, he returns to his small Georgia hometown to collect an inheritance from his Aunt Sally (Ann Nesby). To receive it, he must lead the church choir to victory in a gospel competition. With the help of childhood friend Lilly (Beyoncé K

programme.title: Holes
programme.desc: A boy and his friends question the motives of a woman (Sigourney Weaver) who forces them to dig holes at a detention camp.

programme.title: Pootie Tang
programme.desc: Adapted from a comedy sketch on HBO's The Chris Rock Show, Pootie Tang (Lance Crouther) is the ultimate superhero. A cool-walking, smooth-talking lady's man, Pootie is a hero and a role model to all the kids of the neighborhood. Everybody looks up to Pootie except evil Dick Lecter (Robert Vaughn), CEO of Lecter Corp., a company that makes cigarettes, alcohol and fast food. Pootie shows cool determ

programme.title: B******': The Sound and Fury of Rick James
programme.desc: A raw and intimate documentary look at the wildly colorful life of legendary funk artist Rick James; original interviews with artists, collaborators and friends.

programme.title: Run
programme.desc: Smugglers, the police, locals and tourists get drawn into a dangerous web of survival, sacrifice and shifting loyalties as Europe faces a surge in migration.

programme.title: Regarding Us
programme.desc: After losing her teaching career in the Catholic school system, a transgender woman has a profound impact on the lives of two children, one with two fathers in marital strife, and the other a recent transplant from a conservative household. When the children form a unique bond, new questions and old prejudices erupt.

programme.title: Hotel Artemis
programme.desc: As rioting rocks Los Angeles in the year 2028, disgruntled thieves make their way to Hotel Artemis -- a 13-story, members-only hospital for criminals. It's operated by the Nurse, a no-nonsense, high-tech healer who already has her hands full of a French assassin, an arms dealer and an injured cop. programme.title: The Resurgence: DeMarcus Cousins
programme.desc: A documentary following DeMarcus Cousins while he recovers from an injury that has been a career death sentence for some NBA players; featuring exclusive interviews with teammates, coaches and NBA insiders.

programme.title: NYC Point Gods
programme.desc: Point guards including Rafer Alston, Kenny Anderson, Mark Jackson, Stephon Marbury, Kenny Smith and Rod Strickland hone their craft and taste for showmanship on New York City's iconic playgrounds and in high school gyms in the 1980s and '90s.

programme.title: Hitsville: The Making of Motown
programme.desc: Motown Records becomes the most successful label of all time after its formation in 1958 Detroit amid racial tension and the burgeoning civil rights movement.

programme.title: Attica
programme.desc: During the summer of 1971, tensions between inmates and guards at the Attica Correctional Facility are at an all-time high. On the morning of Sept. 9, it all comes to a head as Attica becomes the stage for one of the largest U.S. prison riots ever.

programme.title: Undisputed
programme.desc: An undefeated world-champion prizefighter, who is convicted of rape and sent to prison, must confront and fight the reigning prison boxing champion.

programme.title: Undisputed II: Last Man Standing
programme.desc: Imprisoned in Russia, a man (Michael Jai White) relies on his street-fighting skills while fighting boxers in the ring.

programme.title: Heist 88
programme.desc: A criminal mastermind decides to pull one last job before going to prison and recruits a group of young bank employees to steal millions in a daring and brazen assault on the U.S. banking system.

programme.title: Things We Lost in the Fire
programme.desc: After her husband dies in an act of senseless violence, Audrey Burke (Halle Berry) is left alone with two young children and no idea how to cope. Nearly paralyzed by grief, Audrey tracks down her husband's childhood friend, Jerry (Benicio del Toro). programme.title: Harriet the Spy
programme.desc: Harriet (Michelle Trachtenberg) may only be in the sixth grade, but she's already found her calling: to be a spy. programme.title: Dean
programme.desc: An illustrator falls in love with a woman while trying to keep his father from burning down the family home after his wife dies.

programme.title: Spy Kids
programme.desc: Two young kids become spies in attempt to save their parents, who are ex-spies, from an evil mastermind. Armed with a bag of high-tech gadgets and out-of-this world transportation, Carmen and Juni will bravely jet through the air, dive under the seas and crisscross the globe in a series of thrilling adventures on a mission to save their parents ... and maybe even the world.

programme.desc: Chuckie (Nancy Cartwright) and Tommy (Elizabeth Daily) find themselves stranded with their parents on a remote island. programme.desc: While shopping at an outdoor market, young reporter Tintin (Jamie Bell), accompanied by his faithful dog, Snowy, buys a model of an old ship called the Unicorn. programme.title: Spotlights: A Showtime Short Film Series
programme.desc: A collection of short films showcasing different themes.

programme.title: Rango
programme.desc: A chameleon who has lived as a sheltered family pet finds himself in the grip of an identity crisis. Rango wonders how to stand out when it is his nature to blend in. programme.title: Indiana Jones and the Raiders of the Lost Ark
programme.desc: Dr. Indiana Jones, a renowned archeologist and expert in the occult, is hired by the U.S. Government to find the ark of the covenant, which is believed to still hold the Ten Commandments. Unfortunately, Hitler's agents are also after the ark. Indy and his ex-flame Marion escape from various close scrapes in a quest that takes them from Nepal to Cairo.

programme.desc: As Adm. James T. Kirk (William Shatner) and Capt. Spock (Leonard Nimoy) monitor trainees at Starfleet Academy, another vessel from the United Federation of Planets is about to try out the planet-creating Genesis Device in a seemingly deserted portion of space. programme.title: Son of Rambow

Though the boys are polar opposites, Lee asks Will to help him make a homemade action movie, inspired by Sylvester Stallone's hit, "Rambo: First Blood." Will, who lives in a strict religious environment, is only too happy to oblige his new friend.

programme.title: Old Henry
programme.desc: A quiet man and his son take in a wounded stranger near his homestead, along with a bag full of cash. The stranger claims he's a sheriff being pursued by outlaws, but the man can't be sure.

programme.title: Uncommon Valor
programme.desc: Col. Cal Rhodes (Gene Hackman), a retired Marine officer, holds out hope that his son, believed to be a prisoner of war in Laos, is still alive. programme.desc: Involuntarily discharged from the Army, a special forces sergeant lands a contract with a private underground military force. When his very first assignment goes awry, the elite soldier finds himself hunted and on the run, caught in a dangerous conspiracy and fighting to stay alive long enough to get home and uncover the true motives of those who betrayed him.

programme.title: Most Wanted
programme.desc: An investigative reporter fights to expose the twisted truth behind a heroin bust orchestrated by dirty cops to frame an innocent man -- sentencing him to life in a Thai prison.

programme.title: 68 Kill

When his very first assignment goes awry, the elite soldier finds himself hunted and on the run, caught in a dangerous conspiracy and fighting to stay alive long enough to get home and uncover the true motives of those who betrayed him.

programme.title: Undisputed
programme.desc: An undefeated world-champion prizefighter, who is convicted of rape and sent to prison, must confront and fight the reigning prison boxing champion.

programme.title: Universal Soldier

programme.title: Good Mourning
programme.desc: A movie star must choose between pursuing his one true love or landing a life-changing role in a film.

programme.title: Walking Out
programme.desc: When a city teen travels to Montana to go hunting with his estranged father, the trip becomes a battle for survival when they encounter a grizzly bear.

programme.title: The Last Stop in Yuma County
programme.desc: Stranded at an Arizona rest stop, a traveling knife salesman gets thrust into a high-stakes hostage situation by the arrival of two bank robbers who will stop at nothing to protect their ill-begotten fortune.

programme.title: Baby Driver
programme.desc: Talented getaway driver Baby relies on the beat of his personal soundtrack to be the best in the game. After meeting the woman of his dreams, he sees a chance to ditch his shady lifestyle and make a clean break. Coerced into working for a crime boss, Baby must face the music as a doomed heist threatens his life, love and freedom.

programme.title: Scream
programme.desc: The sleepy little town of Woodsboro just woke up screaming. There's a killer in their midst who's seen a few too many scary movies. Suddenly nobody is safe, as the psychopath stalks victims, taunts them with trivia questions, then rips them to bloody shreds. It could be anybody...

programme.title: Scream 2
programme.desc: Sydney (Neve Campbell) and tabloid reporter Gale Weathers (Courteney Cox) survived the events of the first Scream, but their nightmare isn't over. When two college students are murdered at a sneak preview of Stab, a movie based on the events from the first film, it's clear a copycat killer is on the loose. Sydney and Gail, as well as fellow survivors Deputy Dewey (David Arquette) and Randy (Jamie

programme.title: Scream 3
programme.desc: In the final installment to this trilogy, a murder spree begins to happen again; this time targeted toward the original Woodsboro survivors and those associated with the movie-inside-a-movie, Stab 3. Sydney must face the demons of her past to stop the killer(s).

programme.title: Quantum of Solace
programme.desc: Following the death of Vesper Lynd, James Bond (Daniel Craig) makes his next mission personal. The hunt for those who blackmailed his lover leads him to ruthless businessman Dominic Greene (Mathieu Amalric), a key player in the organization which coerced Vesper. programme.desc: Four years after the fall of Jurassic World, a rescue mission is launched to save the dinosaurs from a soon-to-erupt volcano. Sci-fi sequel.

programme.desc: An unexploded WWII bomb is discovered on a busy construction site in the centre of London. Chaos ensues as the military and police begin a mass evacuation.

programme.title: Bad Boys II
programme.desc: Cops Will Smith and Martin Lawrence cause mayhem as they investigate a drug smuggling operation. Action. Language/violence/flashing images.

programme.title: Blood For Dust
programme.desc: Drowning in the pressure of providing for his family, a travelling salesman is drawn into a world of crime by his mysterious colleague, Kit Harington.

programme.title: Twilight of the Warriors

programme.desc: Dwayne Johnson is the fearless warrior out to overthrow an evil warlord in ancient Egypt. Epic prequel to The Mummy Returns. Violence.

programme.title: The Mummy: Tomb Of The Dragon Emperor
programme.desc: Adventurer Brendan Fraser goes head-to-head with undead Emperor Jet Li and an army of terracotta warriors. Contains moderate fantasy violence/flashing images.

programme.title: Street Fighter
programme.desc: Action romp based on the hit video game series, starring Jean-Claude Van Damme as a solider taking the fight to crazed military dictator Raul Julia. With Kylie Minogue.

programme.title: Jurassic World: Fallen Kingdom
programme.desc: Four years after the fall of Jurassic World, a rescue mission is launched to save the dinosaurs from a soon-to-erupt volcano. Sci-fi sequel.

programme.title: Fuze

programme.title: Bad Boys
programme.desc: Wise-cracking Miami cops Will Smith and Martin Lawrence fight to protect a witness and bring down a heroin crook. Action comedy.

programme.title: Bad Boys II
programme.desc: Cops Will Smith and Martin Lawrence cause mayhem as they investigate a drug smuggling operation. Action. Language/violence/flashing images.

programme.title: Godzilla
programme.desc: The iconic lizard explodes onto screens as he wreaks havoc on the streets of New York. Can scientist Matthew Broderick find a way to stop the carnage.

programme.title: Superbad
programme.desc: Two teenage friends are on the brink of going to different colleges, so decide to mark the event by going to a party where they hope to lose their virginity. Unfortunately, when a friend steps in to help, the situation gets even worse. Comedy, starring Jonah Hill,

programme.title: Police Academy
programme.desc: An American police college lowers its entrance requirements in the hope of attracting new recruits, and in response, assorted dubious candidates turn up for enrolment. A short-tempered instructor is determined to weed out the bad apples, but a riot provides the clueless cops with a chance to prove their worth. Comedy, starring Steve Guttenberg, Kim Cattrall, Bubba Smith and GW Bailey.

programme.title: Police Academy 2: Their First Assignment
programme.desc: America's most inept cops graduate and are let loose on the streets - under the command of an unscrupulous lieutenant whose promotion depends on their failure. Fortunately for him, their unique brand of policing actually leads to an increase in the crime rate. Comedy sequel, starring Steve Guttenberg, Bubba Smith, David Graf and Michael Winslow.

programme.title: Police Academy 3: Back in Training
programme.desc: Facing closure from cutbacks in public spending and competition from a more successful academy, the police training school calls on its bungling graduates to act as instructors and make good officers out of a bunch of new recruits even more incompetent than they are. Comedy sequel, starring Steve Guttenberg, Bubba Smith, Michael Winslow and Art Metrano.

programme.title: Mean Girls
programme.desc: A teenager is surprised when she is befriended by the girls in the most popular clique at her new school. However, a dating mishap leads to trouble and her supposed friends start to turn on her. programme.title: Funny Cow
programme.desc: A stand-up comedian fights for success on the brutally unforgiving working men's club scene of 1970s northern England. Drama, starring Maxine Peake, Stephen Graham, Paddy Considine and Tony Pitts, who also wrote the screenplay.

programme.title: Mean Machine
programme.desc: A disgraced soccer star jailed for assaulting two policemen is persuaded by the prison authorities to form a football team of inmates to take on the guards. Unfortunately, whipping his fellow prisoners into shape proves a tricky proposition. Comedy drama, starring Vinnie Jones, Jason Statham, David Hemmings and Jason Flemyng.

programme.title: The Cable Guy
programme.desc: A man makes the mistake of engaging a cable TV installer in conversation in a ploy to get all the channels for free. However, the manic repairman shows an invincible determination to be his new best friend - and does not take kindly to rejection. Comedy directed by Ben Stiller, starring Jim Carrey, Matthew Broderick and George Segal.

programme.title: Bridget Jones: Mad About the Boy
programme.desc: Recently widowed Bridget enters the dating game once again, caught between her son's science teacher and a man 20 years her junior. Romantic comedy, starring Renee Zellweger, Chiwetel Ejiofor, Hugh Grant, Leo Woodall and Colin Firth.

programme.title: Superbad
programme.desc: Two teenage friends are on the brink of going to different colleges, so decide to mark the event by going to a party where they hope to lose their virginity. However, they have promised to supply the booze for the event, a task that proves much harder than expected because they are under age. Unfortunately, when a friend steps in to help, the situation gets even worse. Comedy, starring Jonah Hill,

programme.title: The Death of Stalin
programme.desc: The place is Moscow, the year is 1953 and after being in power for nearly 30 years, Soviet dictator Joseph Stalin dies after an inconveniently brief illness. Amid the shock, the members of the Council of Ministers engage in a chaotic bid for power. programme.title: You've Got Mail
programme.desc: Two rivals in the bookshop business fall in love over the internet, unaware they know and dislike each other in the real world. While things remain frosty in person, the pair's anonymous online relationship continues to blossom. Romantic comedy, starring Tom Hanks, Meg Ryan, Greg Kinnear, Parker Posey and Dabney Coleman.

programme.title: Eddie the Eagle
programme.desc: Biopic of British sporting underdog Eddie Edwards. Determined to fulfil his dreams of becoming an Olympic athlete, Edwards trains as a ski jumper - a field in which Britain had no other competitors. He secures a place in the 1988 Winter Olympics, where his can-do attitude makes him a media sensation in the face of a losing streak. Starring Taron Egerton, Hugh Jackman and Christopher Walken.

programme.title: Yesterday
programme.desc: Jack, a struggling musician, gets hit by a bus during a mysterious event. When he regains consciousness, he finds that he is the only person who can remember the Beatles, and sets out to exploit the opportunity by passing their hits off as his own compositions. Danny Boyle's comedy, starring Himesh Patel and Lily James.

programme.title: Sleepless in Seattle
programme.desc: A widowed father is coping badly with his wife's death, but his son is convinced that what he really needs is some new romance in his life. He arranges for his dad to go on a radio phone-in show, and his touching story moves a reporter to respond, even though she is already engaged. She returns to her fiance, but the boy, certain she is the woman for his father, plots to bring them together. Roman

programme.desc: A high school junior comes out as nonbinary and is thrown out of their family's home. With nowhere else to turn, they move in with their estranged older sister and her husband. After enrolling in a new school, they find support from an eccentric art teacher and form an unexpected bond with a kindhearted student.

programme.title: Lovely & Amazing
programme.desc: A finely observed comedy, "Lovely & Amazing" is an intimate family portrait of four hapless but resilient women and the bittersweet lessons they learn in keeping up with the hectic demands of their individual neuroses. Each of the women seeks redemption in her own haphazard way, but whatever salvation they find is illusory and short-lived.

programme.title: Disaster Movie
programme.desc: During a fateful night, a group of impossibly attractive 20-somethings (Matt Lanter, Vanessa Minnillo, Kim Kardashian) must dodge a series of man-made and natural disasters. Twisters, asteroids, earthquakes and singer Amy Winehouse are just some of the perils they face while trying to make their way to safety.

programme.title: Love, Rosie
programme.desc: Rosie and Alex are best friends until Alex's family moves to America. They gamble everything to keep their love and friendship alive over the years and miles.

programme.title: Good Fortune
programme.desc: A well-meaning but inept angel named Gabriel meddles in the lives of a struggling gig worker and a wealthy venture capitalist.

programme.title: Frenemy
programme.desc: Two drifters (Matthew Modine, Callum Blue) in Los Angeles leave behind a trail of murdered women.

programme.title: Highway
programme.desc: Two brothers search for a mythical highway in Kentucky that leads to a marijuana nirvana.

programme.title: Morning Glory

With Tom's mother battling depression after the death of her husband, the young boy is left to his own devices. When Tom develops a crush on schoolmate Melissa, Pappass feels abandoned and begins behaving erratically.

Desperate to experience some derring-do of his own, Nat convinces two of his friends to stow away on Apollo 11. The high-flying trio have the adventure of a lifetime when they must prevent a Russian bug (Tim Curry) from sabotaging the mission.

programme.title: Sitting Bull
programme.desc: Recognizing that Maj. Robert Parrish (Dale Robertson) has a history of making peace with Native American tribes, President Ulysses S. Grant (John Hamilton) sends him to iron out a land dispute with Chief Sitting Bull (J. Carrol Naish). programme.title: Man, Pride and Vengeance
programme.desc: Don Jose (Franco Nero), a Spanish soldier, meets the beautiful Carmen (Tina Aumont) and instantly becomes obsessed with her.

programme.title: Fighting Man of the Plains
programme.desc: Gunslinger and former Confederate Jim Dancer (Randolph Scott) is on a mission to find his brother's killer but mistakenly shoots the wrong man, leading him to become an outlaw. programme.title: Cheyenne
programme.desc: Cheyenne meets a professional killer named Preacher in a saloon.

programme.title: Cheyenne
programme.desc: Cheyenne turns down the job of top hand for rancher Ben Gentry but finds two more offers awaiting him for the same job.

programme.title: Maverick
programme.desc: Bret uses a long-odds poker trick when he is the lone juror holding out for an acquittal in a murder trial.

programme.title: Maverick
programme.desc: Bart helps two countesses by introducing them to the finest society in San Francisco.

programme.title: Brother Outlaw
programme.desc: A man is framed for bank robbery, prompting his brother to spring him from jail. Their search for the real culprits ends in a violent confrontation with a famed gunfighter.

programme.title: Bar 20 Rides Again
programme.desc: Hopalong Cassidy (William Boyd) poses as a wanted man to learn where rustlers are hiding.

programme.title: Disturbing the Peace
programme.desc: A former Texas Ranger with a checkered past is forced to take action when a ruthless biker gang rolls into town looking to cause trouble.

programme.title: Jericho
programme.desc: Jericho (Mark Valley) wakes up with no memory, but it's apparent that he's quite skilled with a gun. programme.title: The Star Packer

programme.title: A Town Called Hell
programme.desc: At the turn of the 20th century in Mexico, an outlaw leads a massacre of a small town. Soldiers and townspeople alike are killed, and, when a priest and his followers take refuge in a church, they too are ruthlessly offed. programme.title: One-Eyed Jacks
programme.desc: After pulling a bank heist in Mexico, the outlaw Rio (Marlon Brando) and his partner, Dad Longworth (Karl Malden), make a run for it, but Dad has bigger plans than freedom. He betrays Rio and absconds with the loot, and Rio ends up in prison. Years pass before Rio finally breaks free to enact his long-plotted revenge. programme.title: McLintock!
programme.desc: Aging rancher George Washington McLintock, a wealthy self-made man, is forced to deal with numerous personal and professional problems. Seemingly everyone wants a piece of his enormous farmstead, including high-ranking government men, McLintock's own sons and nearby Native Americans. programme.title: Maverick
programme.desc: Bart agrees to help the army get out of a stockade in which he was once imprisoned.

programme.title: Cheyenne
programme.desc: Cheyenne must get a herd of horses to a desolate cavalry base.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: Josh is arrested on a false charge and forced to work on a chain gang.

programme.title: Barron's Cove
programme.desc: A man with a violent past kidnaps the boy he holds responsible for his son's death. As he grows closer to uncovering the truth, he's left to wonder whether his pursuers are really seeking to protect the boy, or merely the secrets he keeps.

programme.title: Ida Red
programme.desc: Crime boss Ida "Red" Walker turns to her son, Wyatt, to pull off one last heist to get out of prison. However, with the FBI closing in, Wyatt must soon choose between family and freedom.

programme.title: Due Justice
programme.desc: Consumed by grief and driven by revenge, a former Marine embarks on a relentless mission to hunt down those responsible for the brutal murders of his beloved wife and daughter.

programme.title: Reindeer Games
programme.desc: Just released from prison, all Rudy Duncan (Ben Affleck) wants is to start a new life with Ashley (Charlize Theron), the girl of his dreams, whom he met through pen pal letters in prison. programme.title: Days of Thunder
programme.desc: In the fast-paced world of NASCAR, a rivalry brews between rookie hotshot Cole Trickle (Tom Cruise) and veteran racer Rowdy Burns (Michael Rooker). When both of them are seriously injured in competition, the former bitter rivals become close friends. programme.title: Hard Rain
programme.desc: The small town of Huntingburg is forced to evacuate when torrential rains bring rising floodwaters. The local sheriff and town residents, having been through this before, are all too familiar with the looting and petty thefts that take place in an abandoned town. What they are not aware of, however, is the planned heist of an armored car sent to transport the $3 million from local banks.

programme.title: Black Lotus
programme.desc: A soldier uses his military training to rescue the kidnapped daughter of his dead friend.

programme.title: Confess, Fletch
programme.desc: While investigating a case of stolen paintings, the roguishly charming and endlessly troublesome Fletch becomes the prime suspect in a murder. To prove his innocence, he must sift through a long list of suspects, including his own girlfriend.

programme.title: The Hundred-Foot Journey
programme.desc: Hassan Kadam is an extraordinarily talented and largely self-taught culinary novice. When he and his family are displaced from their native India and settle in a quaint French village, they decide to open an Indian eatery. However, Madame Mallory, the proprietress of an acclaimed restaurant just 100 feet away, strongly objects. War erupts between the two establishments, until Mallory recognizes Ka

programme.title: In & Out
programme.desc: Welcome to Greenleaf, a picture-postcard Indiana town where the high school is the proud focus of attention and alternative lifestyle means you bowl on alternate Tuesdays. On the night of the Oscars telecast, the town's and the world's center of attention is Greenleaf teacher Howard Brackett. A former student who's now a superstar actor tells an audience of millions that Howard is gay.

programme.title: Breakdown
programme.desc: While traveling to California, Taylor and his wife, Amy, experience a vehicle malfunction on a remote highway. Amy Taylor accepts a ride from a truck driver to seek assistance while Jeff Taylor remains with the vehicle. When the couple fails to reunite at a designated location, Jeff Taylor begins a search for his wife despite a lack of assistance from local residents or law enforcement.

programme.title: The Violent Heart
programme.desc: Long-buried secrets threaten to tear a couple apart.

programme.title: Gasoline Alley
programme.desc: Set in the underbelly of Los Angeles, a man is drawn into a high-profile triple murder. The two police detectives on his tail soon join him in attempting to uncover an explosive conspiracy.

programme.title: The Warrior
programme.desc: Set in feudal India, the film is a sweeping mythical adventure story about a lone warrior who renounces his violent role as the longtime enforcer to a local lord -- only to be murderously pursued into the Himalayan mountains by the lord, who refuses to accept his departure.

programme.title: Breach
programme.desc: Fleeing a devastating plague on Earth, an interstellar ark comes under attack from a new threat -- a shape-shifting alien force intent on slaughtering what's left of humanity.

programme.title: Total Recall
programme.desc: Douglas Quaid is a bored construction worker in the year 2084 who dreams of visiting colonized Mars. He visits "Rekall," a company that plants false memories into people's brains, in order to experience the thrill of Mars without having to travel there. programme.title: Indiana Jones and the Kingdom of the Crystal Skull
programme.desc: It's the height of the Cold War, and famous archaeologist Indiana Jones (Harrison Ford), returning from his latest adventure, finds out his job at Marshall College is in jeopardy. He meets Mutt (Shia La Beouf), a young man who wants Indy to help him find the legendary Crystal Skull of Akator, and the pair set out for Peru. However, deadly agent Irina Spalko (Cate Blanchett) is searching for the po

programme.title: Jeff, Who Lives at Home
programme.desc: When Jeff (Jason Segel) leaves his mother's basement to buy wood glue at the store, he looks for signs from the universe to determine his path. However, a series of unexpected and amusing events leads him to cross paths with his family, especially his brother (Ed Helms), in the strangest of circumstances and locations. If Jeff is very lucky and universally blessed, he will find the meaning of his

programme.title: Kambakkht Ishq
programme.desc: A romantic comedy about an Indian stuntman who takes Hollywood by storm but cannot find true love.

programme.title: Bhediya
programme.desc: Bhaskar and his cousin travel for work, but a string of events leads to Bhaskar being attacked by a wolf, giving him werewolf powers.

programme.title: Pink
programme.desc: Three young women are implicated in a crime, and a retired lawyer volunteers to defend them, uncovering truth, secrets, and justice along the way.

programme.title: Sangdil Sanam
programme.desc: Two children are betrothed but the girl's father robs a bank and frames the boy's father for it. Years later, the grown-up boy returns to take his bride back home.

programme.title: Lucky-No Time For Love
programme.desc: Lucky is molested by a Russian boy on her way to school but she escapes and hides in Aditya's car. When a terrorist attack breaks out, the two manage to escape and hide in an isolated graveyard.

programme.title: Total Siyapaa
programme.desc: Aman, a Pakistani man living in London, falls in love with Asha, an Indian woman. But he must convince her parents to let them get married, despite their different nationalities.

programme.title: Chandni
programme.desc: Chandni's fiance, Rohit, is paralysed in an accident and she is forced to relocate to Mumbai where her boss, Lalit, falls for her. However, she faces a dilemma when Rohit returns and woos her too.

programme.title: Seetharamam
programme.desc: Upon returning to Pakistan, Afreen sets off to fulfil her grandfather's wish of delivering a letter from Ram to Sita. Along the way, she finds Ram and learns about their love story.

programme.title: Kalank
programme.desc: Two young lovers in 1945 India uncover long-buried secrets as their romance unfolds, bringing hidden truths to light and altering their lives forever.

programme.title: Sanju
programme.desc: Sanjay Dutt, an actor from the Bollywood film industry, struggles with the legacy that is handed down to him from his parents, along with his personal dilemmas and vices.
